untranslatable_reason: Broadening Wedge requires explicit trend line identification (two up-sloping lines with different slopes, three+ touches on each side). Available indicators cannot measure: (1) dual trend line slopes and their relative steepness, (2) precise touch counts on dynamic trend lines, (3) megaphone shape geometry. Donchian channels approximate volatility expansion but do not capture the specific tilted-wedge structure or distinguish between upper/lower trend line slopes. Pattern detection requires multi-bar structural analysis beyond point-in-time indicator values.
